content.label: Enable live polling
content.doc: Turns on continuous AS5600 polling when the plugin is enabled. Disable this if you only want manual probe and calibration actions.

content.label: I²C bus
content.doc: AS5600 is an I²C device. On Raspberry Pi the normal wiring is SDA=GPIO2 and SCL=GPIO3 on bus 1. This plugin configures the bus number, not arbitrary GPIO pins.

content.label: I²C address
content.doc: Default AS5600 address is 0x36. Keep this unless your board or bridge setup requires a different address format.

content.label: Polling interval (ms)
content.doc: How often the sensor is read during live polling. 40–100 ms is a good starting point.

content.label: Show startup status toast
content.doc: Shows a toast when the plugin successfully opens the sensor or when the sensor is missing.

content.label: Probe sensor now
content.doc: Reads STATUS and RAW ANGLE once and shows the result in a toast. Useful before enabling live polling.

content.label: Invert direction
content.doc: Reverses the calibrated 0–100% direction if your knob runs the opposite way.

content.label: Calibration raw min
content.doc: Stored left stop / start raw reading (0–4095). You can type it manually or capture it with the button below.

content.label: Calibration raw max
content.doc: Stored right stop / end raw reading (0–4095). Wrap-around ranges are supported.

content.label: Action resolution steps
content.doc: How many buckets the plugin uses for toast and custom emit actions across the full calibrated range.

content.label: Capture current angle as min
content.doc: Turn the knob to the left/end position, then click this. The plugin stores the current RAW ANGLE as rawMin and shows a toast.

content.label: Capture current angle as max
content.doc: Turn the knob to the right/end position, then click this. The plugin stores the current RAW ANGLE as rawMax and shows a toast.

content.label: Reset calibration to full 0–4095 range
content.doc: Restores rawMin=0 and rawMax=4095.

askForConfirm.title: Reset calibration
askForConfirm.message: Reset min and max back to the full 0–4095 range?

content.label: Function while turning
content.doc: Choose what the plugin should do when the angle changes during live polling.

content.label: Toast cooldown (ms)
content.doc: Minimum time between toasts when using the toast action.

content.label: Volume step quantization (%)
content.doc: When using volume mapping, only send a new volume when the mapped value changes by this many percent.

content.label: Plugin endpoint
content.doc: Endpoint of the plugin to call, for example user_interface/radio_scale_peppy or music_service/mpd.

content.label: Method name
content.doc: Method to call on the target plugin. The plugin will merge your JSON below with a sensor object containing raw, normalized, percent and zone.

content.label: Additional JSON data
content.doc: Extra JSON payload, for example {} or {"mode":"test"}. The plugin adds sensor telemetry automatically.

content.label: Show current processed state
content.doc: Displays the last processed raw and calibrated percent in a toast.
